title: ChaCha20-Poly1305 and Algorithm Choice · Independent Go Trial
summary: An independent team receives different assets, adversaries, data sizes, cryptoperiods, interoperability duties, availability limits, and compliance claims and transfers chacha20-poly1305 and algorithm choice into a new portable AEAD selection and compatibility matrix. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of portable AEAD selection and compatibility matrix with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practic…
objectives: Use ChaCha20-Poly1305 through its AEAD contract with correct key, nonce, tag, additional-data, and failure handling.
Distinguish standard and XChaCha nonce sizes, interoperability, random-nonce design, and protocol compatibility.
Choose AES-GCM or ChaCha20-Poly1305 from platform acceleration, protocol requirements, misuse risk, compliance, interoperability, and measured performance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Crypto Go Chacha Aead Contract
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab cryptographic engineering team handles case 5101 during a certificate rollover incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to select and verify standard or XChaCha20-Poly1305 with exact sizes, AAD, vectors, and interoperability; preserve accessible status, non-color meaning, keyboard operation, error recovery, and secret-safe diagnostics; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use ChaCha20-Poly1305 through its AEAD contract with correct key, nonce, tag, additional-data, and failure handling.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Crypto Go Chacha Aead Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use chacha20-poly1305 through its aead contract with correct key, nonce, tag, additional-data, and failure handling. For Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Crypto Go Chacha Aead Contract, keep Crypto Go Chacha Aead Contract connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
